pi_items.source: Verified by reading setup_task.sh which generates the docx file at this path.
Verified by reading export_result.sh which explicitly expects the final document at this path.
Verified by checking verifier.py, which asserts that 'pending ratification' is in the document footer, matching the metadata claim.
Verified by reading the python-docx generation logic in setup_task.sh which injects '15%', and verifier.py which checks for a strikethrough run containing '15'.
Verified by reading the python-docx generation logic in setup_task.sh which injects '18%', and verifier.py which checks for an underlined and bolded run containing '18'.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh which generates the paragraph containing 'twenty-four (24) hours' and verifier.py checking for a strikethrough run containing '24'.
Verified by reading setup_task.sh which generates the paragraph containing 'forty-eight (48) hours' and verifier.py checking for an underlined and bolded run containing '48'.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Word document (CBA_Draft.docx). We verified the input/output document paths, and confirmed that the target text elements (15%, 18%, 'twenty-four (24) hours', 'forty-eight (48) hours') directly match the python-docx text generation script in setup_task.sh and the subsequent verification assertions in verifier.py.
